channel.title: JavaScript on kencho51
channel.description: Recent content in JavaScript on kencho51

item.title: Learn, todo and done 31/8-4/9-20
item.description: Learn JavaScript, FCC API, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Fix no ability to remove file attributes #457 Done Complete Behat test for PR View files from large db #437 Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 24-28/8/20
item.description: Learn JavaScript, FCC API, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Done Merged PR Add-guidelines-to-dataset-#494 Complete Behat test for PR View files from large db #437 Changed the browser to headless chrome, pressing a button then work. Using xpath variable, Return key was simulated Reference

item.title: How to make go to page feature
item.description: Problem To add a go to page feature in navigating file table. Details refer to this issue View files from large db #437 How Create a Go to page button match the button style with the whole webpage create btn_click class for this onclick button create input box for number, and assign id=pageTarget <style> .btn_click { border: solid 1px #0eb23c; color: #0fad59; padding: 4px 6px 3px 6px; text-decoration: none; background-color: Transparent; outline:none; } input { width: 3%; } input::-webkit-outer-spin-button, input::-webkit-inner-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; } .

item.title: Learn, todo and done 17-21/8/20
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube JavaScript, FCC Todo Complete Behat test for PR View files from large db #437 Done PR Add-guidelines-to-dataset-#494 Reference
